## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss content strategy, performance, and new initiatives for Hotel Engine](https://fathom.video/share/5LRq2cyDwGq2Rma4AmnjzjQ3Lsw93Fxz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content quality and production are on track; first signals show promising results](https://fathom.video/share/5LRq2cyDwGq2Rma4AmnjzjQ3Lsw93Fxz?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [LLM visibility tracking is in early stages; Hotel Engine may bring in additional expertise](https://fathom.video/share/5LRq2cyDwGq2Rma4AmnjzjQ3Lsw93Fxz?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)
  - [New domain (roomblocks.com) acquired for group/wedding bookings; content strategy needed](https://fathom.video/share/5LRq2cyDwGq2Rma4AmnjzjQ3Lsw93Fxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1564.0)
  - [Transitioning to higher volume content production (40-50 articles/week) with streamlined review process](https://fathom.video/share/5LRq2cyDwGq2Rma4AmnjzjQ3Lsw93Fxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1378.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Quality

  - [7 pieces published (5 new, 2 updates); 10 in production for review by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/5LRq2cyDwGq2Rma4AmnjzjQ3Lsw93Fxz?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
  - [James satisfied with content quality; will focus on reviewing product-specific mentions](https://fathom.video/share/5LRq2cyDwGq2Rma4AmnjzjQ3Lsw93Fxz?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [GrowthX to flag Hotel Engine mentions in docs for easier review](https://fathom.video/share/5LRq2cyDwGq2Rma4AmnjzjQ3Lsw93Fxz?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [Transitioning to 40-50 articles/week; James unable to review all, seeking efficient process](https://fathom.video/share/5LRq2cyDwGq2Rma4AmnjzjQ3Lsw93Fxz?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)

### Analytics and Performance

  - [New content getting indexed quickly, indicating good site authority and structure](https://fathom.video/share/5LRq2cyDwGq2Rma4AmnjzjQ3Lsw93Fxz?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [Small decrease in clicks (500 MoM) but increase in impressions](https://fathom.video/share/5LRq2cyDwGq2Rma4AmnjzjQ3Lsw93Fxz?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [Positive signals for updated content (e.g., travel expense reporting, construction company expenses)](https://fathom.video/share/5LRq2cyDwGq2Rma4AmnjzjQ3Lsw93Fxz?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
  - [Increasing impressions and first clicks on new content](https://fathom.video/share/5LRq2cyDwGq2Rma4AmnjzjQ3Lsw93Fxz?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)

### LLM Visibility Tracking

  - [Using Looker Studio dashboard to track answer engine referrals](https://fathom.video/share/5LRq2cyDwGq2Rma4AmnjzjQ3Lsw93Fxz?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)
  - [Partnership with Scrunch for tracking queries and visibility](https://fathom.video/share/5LRq2cyDwGq2Rma4AmnjzjQ3Lsw93Fxz?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)
  - [James considering bringing in additional expertise for LLM strategy](https://fathom.video/share/5LRq2cyDwGq2Rma4AmnjzjQ3Lsw93Fxz?tab=summary&timestamp=977.0)
  - [GrowthX team (Dave Capone, Jason Gong) to connect with James's contact for knowledge sharing](https://fathom.video/share/5LRq2cyDwGq2Rma4AmnjzjQ3Lsw93Fxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1082.0)

### New Domain: roomblocks.com

  - [Acquired for group and wedding block bookings](https://fathom.video/share/5LRq2cyDwGq2Rma4AmnjzjQ3Lsw93Fxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1564.0)
  - [Currently ranking 3rd organically for "wedding room blocks"](https://fathom.video/share/5LRq2cyDwGq2Rma4AmnjzjQ3Lsw93Fxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1657.0)
  - [Need to develop content strategy and determine site functionality](https://fathom.video/share/5LRq2cyDwGq2Rma4AmnjzjQ3Lsw93Fxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1750.0)
  - [Potential to outrank current top results (Reddit, The Knot)](https://fathom.video/share/5LRq2cyDwGq2Rma4AmnjzjQ3Lsw93Fxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)

## Next Steps

  - [James to review 10 content pieces by Friday; GrowthX to flag Hotel Engine mentions](https://fathom.video/share/5LRq2cyDwGq2Rma4AmnjzjQ3Lsw93Fxz?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [Darrell to set up competitor tracking in Scrunch and share sample prompts with James](https://fathom.video/share/5LRq2cyDwGq2Rma4AmnjzjQ3Lsw93Fxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1133.0)
  - [James to add Darrell to peak.ai dashboard for LLM tracking comparison](https://fathom.video/share/5LRq2cyDwGq2Rma4AmnjzjQ3Lsw93Fxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
  - [GrowthX to start planning content strategy for roomblocks.com](https://fathom.video/share/5LRq2cyDwGq2Rma4AmnjzjQ3Lsw93Fxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1732.0)
  - [Cole to provide audience information and paid ads data for roomblocks.com](https://fathom.video/share/5LRq2cyDwGq2Rma4AmnjzjQ3Lsw93Fxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1696.0)
  - [Evaluate technical feasibility of having booking page on roomblocks.com](https://fathom.video/share/5LRq2cyDwGq2Rma4AmnjzjQ3Lsw93Fxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1768.0)
